title: Malargalai Pol Thangai Lyrics Pasamalar
stanzas:
Malargalai pol
thangai urangugiraal
annan vazha vaippaan
endru amaidhi kondaal (2)

kalaindhidum kanavugal
aval padaithaal
annan kaarpanai thaerinil
parandhu sendraan (2)

Maamani maaligai
maadhargal punnagai
mangala maedaiyin
pon vannam kandaan (2)

maavilai thoranam
aadida kandaan (2)
manamagan vandhu
nindru maalai
soodak kandaan.

kalaindhidum kanavugal
aval padaithaal
annan kaarpanai thaerinil
parandhu sendraan

Aasaiyin paadhaiyil
oadiya pen mayil
anbudan kaalgalil
panidhida kandaan. (2)

vaazhiya kanmani
vazhiya endraan
vanmazhai pol kangal
neeril aadak kandaan

kalaindhidum kanavugal
aval padaithaal
annan kaarpanai thaerinil
parandhu sendraan

poo manam kondaval
paal manam kandaal
pongidum thaaimaiyil
seiyuda nindraal (2)

maamanai paaradi
kanmani endraal
marumagal kangal
thammil maaman
dheivam kandaan.

Malargalai pol
thangai urangugiraal
annan vazha vaippaan
endru amaidhi kondaal

kalaindhidum kanavugal
aval padaithaal
annan kaarpanai thaerinil
parandhu sendraan.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Malargalai Pol Thangai?

The song expresses deep love and admiration, comparing the beloved to beautiful flowers, evoking feelings of tenderness and nostalgia.

In which movie is Malargalai Pol Thangai featured?

This song is featured in the classic Tamil film Pasamalar, known for its emotional depth and memorable music.

Who composed the music for Malargalai Pol Thangai?

The music for this song was composed by the legendary duo Viswanathan–Ramamoorthy, who are celebrated for their contributions to Tamil cinema.

When was Malargalai Pol Thangai released?

This beautiful song was released in 1970, making it a cherished classic in Tamil music history.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the film Pasamalar, Malargalai Pol Thangai serves as a poignant expression of love and devotion. The song's lyrics convey a deep emotional connection, reflecting the beauty and fragility of relationships. Its soothing melody and heartfelt delivery evoke a sense of nostalgia, making it a timeless piece that resonates with audiences even today. This classic track captures the essence of romantic longing, leaving a lasting impression on listeners.

stanzaMeanings: The sister sleeps like a flower.
The sister sleeps like a flower, the brother will take care of her when he is at peace.
The dreams that are broken, she creates them, the brother has flown away in the dream of the imagination.
I saw the golden color of the smiling auspicious platform of the mansion.
I saw the colorful decorations of the festival, the beloved came and stood to see the garland.
I saw the colorful decorations of the festival, the beloved came and stood to see the garland.
The dreams that are broken, she creates them, the brother has flown away in the dream of the imagination.
In the path of desire, the peacock runs with love, I saw her resting on her feet.
The beloved said that the way to live is like the rain, I saw her dancing in the water.
The dreams that are broken, she creates them, the brother has flown away in the dream of the imagination.
If the flower's heart is filled, when the milk heart is seen, it will overflow with love.
If the beloved is seen as a mother, the daughter-in-law will see the mother as a goddess.
The sister sleeps like a flower, the brother will take care of her when he is at peace.
The dreams that are broken, she creates them, the brother has flown away in the dream of the imagination.
